## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor

## Testing

- [ ] Reloaded scripts in Cubase
- [ ] Verified core transport behavior (FS1/FS2/FS3)
- [ ] Verified FS5 tap tempo behavior
- [ ] Verified FS9 click toggle behavior
- [ ] Checked no regressions in lamp feedback

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated `README.md` if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Added/updated markdown documentation in `docs/`

## Checklist

- [ ] Code and docs are in English
- [ ] Changes follow Steinberg MIDI Remote API conventions
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
